listing.title: Bachelors Walk, Dublin 1
listing.description:
***AVAILABLE FROM THE 20TH MAY *****EMAIL ONLY ****

Earnest are delighted to present this fantastic large 1 bedroom apartment to the rental market. This ground floor apartment is situated in the heart of the city and in terms of location its second to none. The property comprises of entrance hall leading into smart and modern living room with separate kitchen just off it , double bedroom with built in wardrobes and well presented bathroom. Outside there is you own patio area.  

The block is within a 5 minute walk of O\'Connell Street, Mary Street Henry Street and a short walk from Temple Bar, Trinity College & Dame Street. There are a host of excellent shops, cafes and restaurants in the immediate vicinity. 
The LUAS red line is located close by at either Jervis Street or Abbey Street and the green line extension will also be a short walk too when up and running at the newly constructed Rosie Hackett Bridge.
